prompt: A breathtaking vertical anime illustration of a delicate steampunk time world filled wall-to-wall with enormous interlocking clocks, exposed gears, rotating rings, pendulums, and ornate mechanical structures in polished gold, brass, bronze, and dark steel. The composition is extremely dense and intricate, with exactly 3 dominant oversized clock faces visible: one in the upper left, one large partial clock in the lower right, and one central ring-like clock structure near the upper middle, surrounded by dozens of smaller visible clockworks and gear assemblies layered deep into the background. A radiant shaft of white-gold light pours down from the top center, creating sparkling highlights, rim light, reflections, lens-like glints, and dramatic depth across the metallic machinery. In the lower left floats a young anime girl, about three-quarter full body, with soft pastel pink long wavy hair streaming outward as if suspended in air, large emerald green eyes, and a gentle, slightly wistful expression. She wears an elaborate dusty rose pink lolita-style dress with heavy frills, lace, ribbons, layered ruffles, floral details, puffed sleeves, corset lacing, and matching heeled shoes, plus a flowered bonnet or mini hat tilted on her head. Her pose is light and floating, one arm slightly extended, skirt and hair blown by invisible motion, as if drifting inside a giant celestial clock tower. The mood is magical, luminous, intricate, and romantic, with ultra-detailed linework, high-contrast lighting, rich metallic reflections, fantasy steampunk aesthetics, and painterly anime rendering in the style of a premium key visual. No text, no borders, no extra characters. Emphasize overwhelming scale, dense mechanical complexity, and the contrast between the soft feminine character and the monumental golden machinery.
